title: Plastic Garlic Grinder Spices Herbs Mortar Pestle Set Grinding Bowl Kitchen Tool for Cooking Apothecaries (Wood Color)
description:
About this item
[PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL] Made of premium solid thick PP plastic for durability and eco-friendly, ensuring non- usage.
[EASY MANUAL OPERATION] Easily grind garlic, ginger, herbs, spices, and more into minced state or powder for fresh flavors in cooking.
[ERGONOMIC DESIGN] Ergonomic pestle is comfortable to hold with a smooth surface that won't hurt your hands even after prolonged use.
[VERSATILE USE] Crushes garlic, ginger, herbs, dry spices, grains, and teas, for cooking as well as in pharmacies and apothecaries.
[OPTIMAL INGESTION] Widely used in pharmacies and apothecaries to powder pills for optimal ingestion, adding convenience to your daily life.
